auth.name: Name
auth.invalidFullName: Please enter a valid full name (letters only, max 100 chars)
auth.invalidPhoneNumber: Please enter a valid phone number
auth.passwordLength: Password must be between 8 and 20 characters.
auth.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
auth.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
auth.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
auth.passwordSpecialChar: Password must contain at least one special character.

login.title: Log in
login.description: Welcome back! Please enter your details.
login.resendVerificationSuccess: A new verification link has been sent to your email.
login.verifyEmailFirst: Email not verified. Please use ‘Resend verification link’ to receive a new verification email.
login.generalError: Login failed. Please try again later.
login.devEnvironmentTitle: Development Environment Only (Simulate Login for SE Employees)
login.noPortalAccess: You do not have access to this portal. Please contact your administrator to be added.

verification.title: Verification
verification.subtitle: A verification link has been sent to your e-mail. Please verify to complete registration.

forgot.title: Forgot password?
forgot.description: No worries, we'll send you reset instructions.
forgot.success: The link has been sent successfully.
forgot.resendResetLinkFull: Didn’t receive the e-mail? Resend reset link

reset.title: Set new password
reset.description: Your new password must be different to previously used passwords.
reset.success: Your password has been successfully reset. Please log in.
reset.tokenExpired: Invalid or expired reset link. Please request a new password reset.

register.success: A verification link has been sent to your e-mail. Please verify to complete registration.
register.verificationSentSuccess: A verification link has been sent to your email successfully
register.generalError: Registration failed. Please try again later.

verifyEmail.title: Verification complete
verifyEmail.subtitle: You can access all available investment and qualification opportunities in the BENA portal.
verifyEmail.success: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now log in.
